description: 5 identical prompts for thinking-mode delta comparison — runs with thinking enabled and disabled to compare score, token, and latency deltas

questions.question:
Reply with ONLY the number.
A farmer has chickens and cows. Total animals: 15. Total legs: 44. How many chickens are there?

metadata.author: crucibulum-core
metadata.diagnostic_purpose: Measures thinking-mode delta by comparing score, token usage, and latency between thinking-enabled and thinking-disabled runs
